issues.description: Original invoice and deduction sheet must be sent to Local Employer's Dalian Branch. Business expenses must be submitted within 4 months from date of issuance. Manager approval required. Submit expense reimbursement form to direct manager with Local Employer cc'd payroll.all@talentbankglobal.com, indicating total amount in email body. Forward approved emails/documents and completed expense reimbursement template to payroll.all@talentbankglobal.com before 5th of month. Original invoices must be submitted before 20th of month according to local employer's invoice filing guidelines. Exchange rate documentation required - use spot exchange purchase price issued by Bank of China on first working day of month after returning from business trip. Foreign currency expenses must be entered line by line according to invoices.
issues.recommendation: Please ensure to submit the required original invoice, deduction sheet, and other necessary documentation as per the specified guidelines.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Original invoice and deduction sheet must be sent to Local Employer's Dalian Branch: Name: Sylvia Jiang, Office Address: 大连市高新园区高新街9号晟辉科技大厦703室, Tel.: +86 17615158127 or 0411-81760355 dial 808. Use S.F. Express paid by shipper and collect express fee invoice for reimbursement. Business expenses must be submitted within 4 months from date of issuance. Invoices cannot be used across years. Manager approval required. Submit expense reimbursement form to direct manager with Local Employer cc'd payroll.all@talentbankglobal.com, indicating total amount in email body. Forward approved emails/documents and completed expense reimbursement template to payroll.all@talentbankglobal.com before 5th of month. Original invoices must be submitted before 20th of month according to local employer's invoice filing guidelines. Exchange rate documentation required - use spot exchange purchase price issued by Bank of China on first working day of month after returning from business trip. Foreign currency expenses must be entered line by line according to invoices.

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has several compliance issues including missing mandatory fields such as invoice number, receipt number, date of issue, tax amount, and transaction time. Additionally, there are missing supporting documentation requirements as per the compliance policies. These issues need to be addressed to ensure compliance.
